chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, CJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-5618 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.7266/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 1st April 2024 Petitioner, Mst. Sadaf Ather, present in person. -*-*-*-*-*- Petitioner appearing in person seeks urgency and wants to withdraw instant petition unconditionally, as according to petitioner, her grievance has been redressed. Accordingly, instant Constitution Petition stands dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
